title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Himalaya Drug Company Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Himalaya Drug Company Global Group:
Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company Global Group!
